channel.title: Time Management on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Time Management on MinWeb

item.title: Stop Procrastinating: The Power of Micro-Starts
item.description: Stop procrastinating for good by using the power of micro-starts to bypass your brain's fear response and turn overwhelming projects into manageable tasks.

item.title: Stop Forgetting to Reply: A Simple Trick to Stay Responsive
item.description: Tired of accidentally ghosting friends? Discover a simple psychological trick to help you stop forgetting to reply and master your digital communication habits.

item.title: Stop Rewarding Chronic Lateness: Start Meetings on Time
item.description: Stop rewarding chronic lateness and reclaim your team's productivity by learning why starting meetings on time is essential for a professional culture.
